svg.aria-label: KISA Security Advisory Ransomware Linux Rootkit Backup 3-2-1
svg.title: KISA Advisory: Ransomware 3-2-1 Backup + Linux Rootkit Detection

g.text: WORM storage - object lock - cross-region replication
S3 Object Lock - Glacier Vault Lock - GCS retention
Restore drill quarterly - RTO 4hr - RPO 15min target
Kernel-mode rootkit detection - LKM tampering scan
Cron daily scan - alert on syscall table modification
eBPF telemetry - Falco runtime detection rules
E-commerce breach data - weaponized in phishing
Brand monitoring - phishing domain takedown via CERT
